breakdown: This PR extracts level-up pipeline logic from game_state.py into a dedicated rewards_engine.py module, following single-responsibility principle. The new module contains functions for state flag checking, level-up signal resolution, rewards box normalization, and UI projection. Architecture is excellent with clean module boundaries and proper separation of concerns. Test coverage includes tests for level-up signals and rewards box functionality. Some gaps in error handling (assertions vs exceptions) and minor type safety concerns with some Any return types.
key_changes: Created new rewards_engine.py module extracting level-up pipeline from game_state.py
Added new functions: ensure_rewards_box, normalize_rewards_box, is_level_up_active, project_level_up_ui
Updated world_logic.py imports to use rewards_engine module
Updated test_startup_import_regression.py to test llm_parser instead of streaming_orchestrator
